name: 🐜 RAPP Ant Farm
title: Distributed Swarm — Self-Coordinating
incantation: RUNE COPPER BLADE COPPER ANVIL ANVIL BLADE

abilities.name: Drop Pheromone
abilities.text: Post a content-addressed pheromone Issue. Chain to prev_hash. The colony detects tampering automatically.

abilities.name: Synthesize
abilities.text: Aggregate the colony's pheromone chain into a rapp-colony-observation/1.0. No new pheromones created.

flavor_text: Many ants, one trail. The colony writes the story.
